# services.immich-public-proxy

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.immich-public-proxy`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.immich-public-proxy.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Immich Public Proxy. |
| `services.immich-public-proxy.immichUrl` | `string` | URL of the Immich instance |
| `services.immich-public-proxy.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the IPP port in the firewall |
| `services.immich-public-proxy.package` | `package` | The immich-public-proxy package to use. |
| `services.immich-public-proxy.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port that IPP will listen on. |
| `services.immich-public-proxy.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Configuration for IPP. See <https://github.com/alangrainger/immich-public-proxy/blob/main/README.md#additional-configuration> for options and defaults. |
